\subsection*{Five-Stage GR Closure Chain}

The GR branch closes in five sequential stages, each discharging one obligation:

\begin{enumerate}
\item \texttt{ob:GR.real} discharged by \texttt{thm:GR.realization} [C]
\item \texttt{ob:GR.deform} discharged by \texttt{thm:GR.deformation} [C]
\item \texttt{ob:GR.compat} + \texttt{ob:GR.EFE1/2/3} discharged by \texttt{thm:GR.compat} [C]
\item \texttt{ob:GR.closure} discharged by \texttt{thm:GR.domain} (= GR.9.1) [C]
\item Book~VI legitimacy: \texttt{thm:VI.9.1} [U] licenses the continuum transition
\end{enumerate}

The global frontier \texttt{ob:GR.global-subcriticality} is \emph{not} discharged.
Domain-bounded CERT-CLOSE is achieved; global CERT-CLOSE is not claimed.

\subsection*{Governance Boundary Conditions}

\begin{itemize}
